---
name: Skill request / improvement
about: Request a new skill, a taxonomy cleanup, or an improvement to an existing skill
---

## Request type
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Improve existing skill
- [ ] Merge / split overlapping skills
- [ ] Rename / taxonomy cleanup
- [ ] Documentation / README improvement

## Goal
What should the repository support that it does not support well today?

## Affected area
Examples:
- astronomy
- workflows
- infrastructure
- python
- github

## Existing skills involved
List any overlapping or related skills.

## Proposed behavior
Describe the desired workflow, naming, or scope.

## Why this matters
What user problem or confusion does this solve?

## Acceptance criteria
How should we know the improvement is complete?
